narrative:
Marion County has 38,338 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a clear Republican lean of 10.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants.
